meaning: 威尼托区[意大利行政区名]
examples: Venice is the center of the larger region of Veneto.
VICENZA is a pleasant, prosperous city in the Veneto, 60km west of Venice.
We'll also have an election roundup from the streets of New York to the Via Veneto.
Yet another after-life anomaly is the crypt of Santa Maria della Concezione dei Cappuccini on Via Vittorio Veneto.
The doctor had a three-story palazzo on a canal and a country home in the Veneto (both still standing today).
